info.name: Google Campaign Manager Campaign Manager 360 API
Campaigns
Google Campaign Manager List Campaigns

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

params.name: advertiserIds
params.description: Select only campaigns that belong to these advertisers.

params.name: ids
params.description: Select only campaigns with these IDs.

params.name: searchString
params.description: Search string for filtering results. Matches against campaign name and ID fields.

params.name: archived
params.description: Select only archived campaigns. Default is false.

params.name: sortField
params.description: Field by which to sort the list.

params.name: sortOrder
params.description: Order of sorted results.

params.name: maxResults
params.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default is 1000.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Value of the nextPageToken from the previous result page.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of campaigns, possibly filtered. Results are returned in descending order by last modified time. Use query parameters to filter by advertiser, archive status, search string, or specific campaign IDs.

info.name: Google Campaign Manager Create a Campaign

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

items.docs: Inserts a new campaign. The campaign is created under the specified advertiser with the provided configuration. Required fields include name, advertiserId, startDate, and endDate.

info.name: Google Campaign Manager Get a Campaign

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

params.name: campaignId
params.description: Campaign ID.

items.docs: Gets one campaign by ID.

info.name: Google Campaign Manager Update a Campaign

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

params.name: campaignId
params.description: Campaign ID.

items.docs: Updates an existing campaign. All writable fields must be provided in the request body; unset writable fields will be reset to their default values.

info.name: Google Campaign Manager Patch a Campaign

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

params.name: campaignId
params.description: Campaign ID.

items.docs: Updates an existing campaign. This method supports patch semantics; only the fields specified in the request body are modified.

info.name: Ads
Google Campaign Manager List Ads

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

params.name: campaignIds
params.description: Select only ads belonging to these campaigns.

params.name: advertiserIds
params.description: Select only ads belonging to these advertisers.

params.name: ids
params.description: Select only ads with these IDs.

params.name: placementIds
params.description: Select only ads with these placement IDs assigned.

params.name: type
params.description: Select only ads with the specified type.

params.name: active
params.description: Select only active ads.

params.name: archived
params.description: Select only archived ads.

params.name: searchString
params.description: Search string for filtering results. Matches against ad name and ID fields.

params.name: maxResults
params.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default is 1000.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Value of the nextPageToken from the previous result page.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of ads, possibly filtered. Results are returned in descending order by last modified time. Use query parameters to filter by campaign, advertiser, type, or other criteria.

info.name: Google Campaign Manager Create an Ad

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

items.docs: Inserts a new ad. The ad is created under the specified campaign and advertiser with the provided delivery, creative rotation, and targeting configuration.

info.name: Google Campaign Manager Get an Ad

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

params.name: adId
params.description: Ad ID.

items.docs: Gets one ad by ID.

info.name: Google Campaign Manager Update an Ad

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

params.name: adId
params.description: Ad ID.

items.docs: Updates an existing ad. All writable fields must be provided in the request body.

info.name: Google Campaign Manager Patch an Ad

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

params.name: adId
params.description: Ad ID.

items.docs: Updates an existing ad. This method supports patch semantics; only the fields specified in the request body are modified.

info.name: Placements
Google Campaign Manager List Placements

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

params.name: campaignIds
params.description: Select only placements belonging to these campaigns.

params.name: advertiserIds
params.description: Select only placements belonging to these advertisers.

params.name: ids
params.description: Select only placements with these IDs.

params.name: siteIds
params.description: Select only placements associated with these sites.

params.name: groupIds
params.description: Select only placements belonging to these placement groups.

params.name: compatibilities
params.description: Select only placements with these compatibilities.

params.name: searchString
params.description: Search string for filtering results.

params.name: maxResults
params.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default is 1000.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Value of the nextPageToken from the previous result page.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of placements, possibly filtered. Results are returned in descending order by last modified time.

info.name: Google Campaign Manager Create a Placement

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

items.docs: Inserts a new placement. The placement is associated with a campaign, site, and directory site, and defines the ad inventory configuration for a specific location on a publisher site.

info.name: Google Campaign Manager Get a Placement

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

params.name: placementId
params.description: Placement ID.

items.docs: Gets one placement by ID.

info.name: Google Campaign Manager Update a Placement

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

params.name: placementId
params.description: Placement ID.

items.docs: Updates an existing placement.

info.name: Google Campaign Manager Patch a Placement

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

params.name: placementId
params.description: Placement ID.

items.docs: Updates an existing placement. This method supports patch semantics.

info.name: Google Campaign Manager Generate Placement Tags

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

params.name: placementIds
params.description: Generate tags for these placements.

params.name: tagFormats
params.description: Tag formats to generate.

params.name: campaignId
params.description: Generate placements belonging to this campaign.

items.docs: Generates tags for one or more placements. Tags are the code snippets that publishers place on their sites to enable ad serving for the associated placements.

info.name: Reports
Google Campaign Manager List Reports

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

params.name: scope
params.description: The scope that defines which results are returned.

params.name: maxResults
params.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default is 1000.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Value of the nextPageToken from the previous result page.

items.docs: Retrieves list of reports. Results are ordered by last modified time descending.

info.name: Google Campaign Manager Create a Report

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

items.docs: Creates a report. Configure the report type, criteria with dimensions and metrics, date range, and optional scheduling for automated delivery.

info.name: Google Campaign Manager Get a Report

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

params.name: reportId
params.description: The ID of the report.

items.docs: Retrieves a report by its ID.

info.name: Google Campaign Manager Update a Report

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

params.name: reportId
params.description: The ID of the report.

items.docs: Updates a report.

info.name: Google Campaign Manager Patch a Report

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

params.name: reportId
params.description: The ID of the report.

items.docs: Updates a report. This method supports patch semantics.

info.name: Google Campaign Manager Delete a Report

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

params.name: reportId
params.description: The ID of the report.

items.docs: Deletes a report by its ID.

info.name: Google Campaign Manager Run a Report

params.name: profileId
params.description: The Campaign Manager 360 user profile ID. Each user has a profile for each account they have access to.

params.name: reportId
params.description: The ID of the report.

params.name: synchronous
params.description: If set to true, tries to run the report synchronously. If the report is too large for synchronous processing, it runs asynchronously instead.

items.docs: Runs a report. The report is executed asynchronously. Use the files endpoint to check report completion status and download the generated report file.
